◎简　　介  

　　Executive producer Kristen Bell, who also appears, reunites the cast of a high school musical and asks them to perform it again twenty years later. Each former student reprises their role from their original production of Stephen Sondheim and James LaPine's Tony-winning musical, "Into the Woods" under the tutelage of Broadway directors, choreographers and voice coaches.

◎获奖情况  

　　第70届美国导演工会奖(2018)
　　最佳真人电视节目导演(提名) 希沙姆·阿贝德
